notes:
v1.1.4 Patch
🐛 Editor style leak: The GM card editor's dark styling no longer bleeds into other Smartphone Widget apps. It was turning the Notes editor dark and making typed text almost invisible.

announcement.title: 🪪 ID Card App v1.1.4
announcement.content:
ID Card App v1.1.4 fixes a style conflict with the Notes app.

  • The GM card editor's dark theme no longer leaks into other Smartphone Widget apps.
  • This was making the Notes editor's text almost unreadable on a dark background.
